source_plan: Find all orders in the last 7 days that used coupon BOGO; export to saved view saved_view_bogo_recent.

steps.intent: Open the admin orders list filtered to coupon BOGO and the last 7 days at {{ENV_URL}}/admin/orders?coupon=BOGO&since_days=7.
Read the order ids in the filtered orders table. These are the export targets.
Select every visible BOGO order via the checkboxes, choose saved_view_bogo_recent in the bulk view-selector, and click 'Add to view' to submit /admin/orders/bulk/add_to_view.
